message:
fix(codegen): Handle import_from scope escape and add numpy.testing

- Add import_from handling to scope_analyzer.zig to detect variables
  created by `from X import Y as Z` inside if/else/try/for/while blocks
- Modify genImportFrom to generate assignments for hoisted variables
  instead of skipping them (fixes func scope leakage issue)
- Create numpy_testing.zig module with core assertion functions:
  assert_, assert_equal, assert_array_equal, assert_almost_equal,
  assert_allclose, assert_string_equal, assert_raises
- Register numpy.testing module in import_registry and Lib_exports
- Fix T shadowing in type_checks.zig using unique __chk_type_{id} names
